To address these challenges, we propose Seed2Scale, a self-evolving data engine that overcomes the data bottleneck through a heterogeneous synergy of "small-model collection, large-model evaluation, and target-model learning". Starting with as few as four seed demonstrations, the engine employs the lightweight Vision-Language-Action model, SuperTiny, as a dedicated collector, leveraging its strong inductive bias for robust exploration in parallel environments. Concurrently, a pre-trained Vision-Language Model is integrated as a Verifer to autonomously perform success/failure judgment and quality scoring for the massive generated trajectories. Seed2Scale effectively mitigates model collapse, ensuring the stability of the self-evolution process. Experimental results demonstrate that Seed2Scale exhibits signifcant scaling potential: as iterations progress, the success rate of the target model shows a robust upward trend, achieving a performance improvement of 131.2%. Furthermore, Seed2Scale signifcantly outperforms existing data augmentation methods, providing a scalable and cost-effective pathway for the large-scale development of Generalist Embodied AI. Project page: https://terminators2025.github.io/Seed2Scale.github.io

</details>


### [481] [SAIL: Test-Time Scaling for In-Context Imitation Learning with VLM](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.08269)
*Makoto Sato,Yusuke Iwasawa,Yujin Tang,So Kuroki*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出了一种新的机器人模仿学习方法SAIL，通过迭代优化轨迹、检索历史成功经验，并引入视觉语言模型评分，实现了更强适应性的单次演示轨迹生成。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于环境演示的机器人模仿学习方法，在仅根据一次轨迹演示生成操作时，因环境变化易失效，缺乏鲁棒性。如何让机器人用有限演示实现更泛化的技能习得，是当前挑战。

Method: 提出SAIL框架，将轨迹生成转化为迭代精炼问题，采用蒙特卡洛树搜索（MCTS）：每个节点为一次完整轨迹，通过边进行轨迹微调。系统包含：1. 自动化轨迹归档与相关检索模块，2. 基于视觉-语言模型的轨迹评分机制，3. 步级反馈提供分步精炼信息。

Result: 在6项虚拟与真实机器人操作任务中，实验表明SAIL随着推理计算量增加，成功率持续提升，复杂任务可达95%。

Conclusion: 轨迹级的推理计算可扩展性是提升机器人通用性的有效路径。SAIL为更普适的机器人代理提供了强有力的方法理论和实验依据。

Abstract: In-context imitation learning allows robots to acquire skills from demonstrations, yet one-shot trajectory generation remains fragile under environmental variation. We propose SAIL, a framework that reframes robot imitation as an iterative refinement problem capable of scaling with test-time compute. SAIL utilizes Monte Carlo Tree Search, where each node is a complete trajectory and edges correspond to trajectory refinements. The process is guided by three core components: an automated archive of successful trajectories for contextually relevant retrieval, a vision language model-based scoring mechanism for trajectory evaluation, and a step-level feedback that provides trajectory-aligned scores for iterative refinement. Experiments across six diverse manipulation tasks in simulation and real-world validation clearly demonstrate that increasing test-time compute consistently improves success rates, achieving up to 95% on complex tasks. Our results suggest that trajectory-level test-time scaling is a robust path toward more generalizable robotic agents.

</details>


### [482] [Less is More: Robust Zero-Communication 3D Pursuit-Evasion via Representational Parsimony](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.08273)
*Jialin Ying,Zhihao Li,Zicheng Dong,Guohua Wu,Yihuan Liao*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文研究了在有延迟、部分可观测和操作受限的复杂三维环境下，多智能体追逃问题的鲁棒性提升方法，并提出削减冗余交互通道能够提升系统容错性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 大多数多智能体强化学习（MARL）依赖丰富的智能体间交互或集中式信号，但这些依赖在通信延迟或噪声环境下容易导致系统脆弱。作者希望探究减少表示和通信的“简约性”，是否能提升缺乏通信条件下的协作能力和鲁棒性。

Method: （1）采用一个参数精简的智能体观测接口，降低了观测维度（83维降低到50维），并完全移除了团队耦合信息。（2）提出了一种贡献门控信用分配（CGCA）机制，实现无需通信的局部协作奖励组织。（3）基于继承的去中心化追逃架构进行实验评估，并以“阶段5”（4追1逃）为测试场景。

Result: 精简后的模型在主要任务上表现优异：成功率0.753，碰撞率0.223，均优于原全观测模型（成功率0.721，碰撞率0.253）。在噪声、延迟、速度等压力测试下表现出更优的“优雅退化”特性，并在零样本迁移（城市峡谷地图）下也达到了约61%的成功率。

Conclusion: 结论证明：主动切断冗余多智能体间的信息通道可以有效抑制误差级联，提高系统在高延迟和高噪声环境下的鲁棒性，从而为多智能体系统的工程部署带来新的实用范式。

Abstract: Asymmetric 3D pursuit-evasion in cluttered voxel environments is difficult under communication latency, partial observability, and nonholonomic maneuver limits. While many MARL methods rely on richer inter-agent coupling or centralized signals, these dependencies can become fragility sources when communication is delayed or noisy. Building on an inherited path-guided decentralized pursuit scaffold, we study a robustness-oriented question: can representational parsimony improve communication-free coordination? We instantiate this principle with (i) a parsimonious actor observation interface that removes team-coupled channels (83-D to 50-D), and (ii) Contribution-Gated Credit Assignment (CGCA), a locality-aware credit structure for communication-denied cooperation. In Stage-5 evaluation (4 pursuers vs. 1 evader), our configuration reaches 0.753 +/- 0.091 success and 0.223 +/- 0.066 collision, outperforming the 83-D FULL OBS counterpart (0.721 +/- 0.071, 0.253 +/- 0.089). It further shows graceful degradation under speed/yaw/noise/delay stress tests and resilient zero-shot transfer on urban-canyon maps (about 61% success at density 0.24). These results support a practical paradigm shift: explicitly severing redundant cross-agent channels can suppress compounding error cascades and improve robustness in latency-prone deployment.

</details>


### [483] [EndoSERV: A Vision-based Endoluminal Robot Navigation System](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.08324)
*Junyang Wu,Fangfang Xie,Minghui Zhang,Hanxiao Zhang,Jiayuan Sun,Yun Gu,Guang-Zhong Yang*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出了一种名为EndoSERV的新型机器人内腔导航定位方法，结合分段结构化和虚实映射技术，实现了更准确的位姿估计，并在无真实标签的情况下在公有和临床数据集上验证了其有效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有内镜机器人导航方法受限于组织变形、体内噪声和缺乏显著特征点，导致定位不准，亟需更鲁棒的视觉导航方案。

Method: EndoSERV方法包含两部分：1）将复杂腔道分割为更小区域，分别估计运动轨迹；2）通过图像特征的虚实映射技术，实现利用虚拟环境下的标签做迁移学习。训练分为离线阶段提取去纹理特征和在线阶段适应实际环境。

Result: 在多个公开和临床数据集上，EndoSERV即使没有真实的位姿标签，依然实现了准确定位，显著优于现有方法。

Conclusion: EndoSERV为机器人内腔定位提供了一种高精度、无真实标签依赖的解决方案，有望推广到实际临床内镜导航中使用。

Abstract: Robot-assisted endoluminal procedures are increasingly used for early cancer intervention. However, the intricate, narrow and tortuous pathways within the luminal anatomy pose substantial difficulties for robot navigation. Vision-based navigation offers a promising solution, but existing localization approaches are error-prone due to tissue deformation, in vivo artifacts and a lack of distinctive landmarks for consistent localization. This paper presents a novel EndoSERV localization method to address these challenges. It includes two main parts, \textit{i.e.}, \textbf{SE}gment-to-structure and \textbf{R}eal-to-\textbf{V}irtual mapping, and hence the name. For long-range and complex luminal structures, we divide them into smaller sub-segments and estimate the odometry independently. To cater for label insufficiency, an efficient transfer technique maps real image features to the virtual domain to use virtual pose ground truth. The training phases of EndoSERV include an offline pretraining to extract texture-agnostic features, and an online phase that adapts to real-world conditions. Extensive experiments based on both public and clinical datasets have been performed to demonstrate the effectiveness of the method even without any real pose labels.

</details>


### [484] [Hierarchical Multi-Modal Planning for Fixed-Altitude Sparse Target Search and Sampling](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.08336)
*Lingpeng Chen,Yuchen Zheng,Apple Pui-Yi Chui,Junfeng Wu,Ziyang Hong*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种固定高度、层次化的信息多模态搜索框架（HIMoS），提高了水下机器人对稀疏珊瑚等现象搜集的效率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 稀疏底栖现象（如珊瑚群落）监测对自主水下机器人挑战极大，传统方法不仅覆盖不经济，新兴方法又需高成本垂直机动，因此需新的高效策略。

Method: 提出HIMoS系统：集成异构传感器，采用双层规划架构。战略层实现全局路由优化以最大化发现概率；战术层通过递归视野局部规划，利用可微分的信念传播在探索声学信息、视觉搜寻和近距离采样间寻优。

Result: 通过基于真实珊瑚礁调查数据的高保真仿真验证，HIMoS系统在任务效率上显著优于当前主流方法。

Conclusion: HIMoS框架兼顾覆盖效率与能源消耗，为海底稀疏现象智能监测提供了更优解决方案。

Abstract: Efficient monitoring of sparse benthic phenomena, such as coral colonies, presents a great challenge for Autonomous Underwater Vehicles. Traditional exhaustive coverage strategies are energy-inefficient, while recent adaptive sampling approaches rely on costly vertical maneuvers. To address these limitations, we propose HIMoS (Hierarchical Informative Multi-Modal Search), a fixed-altitude framework for sparse coral search-and-sample missions. The system integrates a heterogeneous sensor suite within a two-layer planning architecture. At the strategic level, a Global Planner optimizes topological routes to maximize potential discovery. At the tactical level, a receding-horizon Local Planner leverages differentiable belief propagation to generate kinematically feasible trajectories that balance acoustic substrate exploration, visual coral search, and close-range sampling. Validated in high-fidelity simulations derived from real-world coral reef benthic surveys, our approach demonstrates superior mission efficiency compared to state-of-the-art baselines.

</details>


### [485] [PhaForce: Phase-Scheduled Visual-Force Policy Learning with Slow Planning and Fast Correction for Contact-Rich Manipulation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.08342)
*Mingxin Wang,Zhirun Yue,Renhao Lu,Yizhe Li,Zihan Wang,Guoping Pan,Kangkang Dong,Jun Cheng,Yi Cheng,Houde Liu*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: PhaForce提出了一种结合视觉和力觉的相位调度策略，显著提升了机器人在复杂接触任务中的表现和自适应能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统生成式视觉运动策略由于推理延迟和动作分块，无法高频率充分利用力/力矩传感信号。同时，现有基于力的方法缺乏对施加力的明确调度和分阶段控制，导致动作不可控、效率不高。本文旨在解决如何在不同任务阶段有效利用视觉和力觉信号，实现高质量、适应性强的操作。

Method: PhaForce方法包括：(1) 接触感知相位预测器（CAP），用于估计接触概率和任务阶段；(2) 慢速扩散规划器，实现视觉-力觉信息融合，并通过正交残差注入保护视觉语义；(3) 快速校正器，在高频率下根据任务相位在可解释的校正子空间内做微调，实现接触细节优化。三者协同，通过统一的相位/接触调度机制结合低频规划和高频微调。

Result: 在多种真实机器人接触密集操作任务上，PhaForce取得了平均86%的成功率，比基准方法高40个百分点。此外，其通过合理调控交互力，显著提升了接触质量，并在遇到未见几何扰动时表现出较强的自适应能力。

Conclusion: PhaForce能够高效协调低速块级规划与高速残差修正，在确保视觉语义主导的前提下，充分利用力觉信息进行实时反馈调整。该方法有效提升了机器人接触密集任务的成功率和自适应能力，为视觉-力觉融合的闭环操控提供了新思路。

Abstract: Contact-rich manipulation requires not only vision-dominant task semantics but also closed-loop reactions to force/torque (F/T) transients. Yet, generative visuomotor policies are typically constrained to low-frequency updates due to inference latency and action chunking, underutilizing F/T for control-rate feedback. Furthermore, existing force-aware methods often inject force continuously and indiscriminately, lacking an explicit mechanism to schedule when / how much / where to apply force across different task phases. We propose PhaForce, a phase-scheduled visual--force policy that coordinates low-rate chunk-level planning and high-rate residual correction via a unified contact/phase schedule. PhaForce comprises (i) a contact-aware phase predictor (CAP) that estimates contact probability and phase belief, (ii) a Slow diffusion planner that performs dual-gated visual--force fusion with orthogonal residual injection to preserve vision semantics while conditioning on force, and (iii) a Fast corrector that applies control-rate phase-routed residuals in interpretable corrective subspaces for within-chunk micro-adjustments. Across multiple real-robot contact-rich tasks, PhaForce achieves an average success rate of 86% (+40 pp over baselines), while also substantially improving contact quality by regulating interaction forces and exhibiting robust adaptability to OOD geometric shifts.

</details>


### [486] [Perception-Aware Communication-Free Multi-UAV Coordination in the Wild](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.08379)
*Manuel Boldrer,Michal Kamler,Afzal Ahmad,Martin Saska*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种无需通信的多机器人安全协作方法，适用于GNSS受限的复杂环境，通过机载各向异性3D激光雷达实现SLAM、障碍物和邻近机器人检测。方法经仿真及实地验证，具备良好的可扩展性和鲁棒性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在森林等GNSS无法工作的复杂环境中，多机器人协调面临通信和感知受限等挑战。现有方法往往要求通信设施或宽阔传感视野，因此亟需一种无需外部通信且能应对有限视野的安全导航方法。

Method: 提出了一种以3D各向异性激光雷达为核心的感知驱动三维导航框架，机器人依靠自身传感器进行SLAM、障碍物及邻居检测，无需外部通信，能在有限视野下实现安全协作和目标导航。

Result: 通过多种不同场景的大规模仿真测试及实地实验，验证了该方法的可扩展性、鲁棒性以及在实际环境下的可靠性。

Conclusion: 方法能够有效支撑多机器人在复杂、GNSS不可用环境中的安全协作，并具备良好的实用性和推广前景。

Abstract: We present a communication-free method for safe multi-robot coordination in complex environments such as forests with dense canopy cover, where GNSS is unavailable. Our approach relies on an onboard anisotropic 3D LiDAR sensor used for SLAM as well as for detecting obstacles and neighboring robots. We develop a novel perception-aware 3D navigation framework that enables robots to safely and effectively progress toward a goal region despite limited sensor field-of-view. The approach is evaluated through extensive simulations across diverse scenarios and validated in real-world field experiments, demonstrating its scalability, robustness, and reliability.

</details>


### [487] [MoMaStage: Skill-State Graph Guided Planning and Closed-Loop Execution for Long-Horizon Indoor Mobile Manipulation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.08383)
*Chenxu Li,Zixuan Chen,Yetao Li,Jiapeng Xu,Hongyu Ding,Jieqi Shi,Jing Huo,Yang Gao*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: MoMaStage是一个结构化视觉-语言框架，针对室内移动操作任务，显著提升了长期任务的执行一致性与成功率，无需显式场景建模，并可适应动态环境。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有室内移动操作的自然语言驱动执行存在长期过程中的一致性难题与泛化能力不足，既有方法受限于结构僵化或缺乏适应性，难以支持复杂动态环境中的任务分解与执行。

Method: 提出MoMaStage框架，将视觉-语言模型与分层技能库及拓扑感知的技能-状态图结合，限定任务和技能复合在可行的状态转移空间内。通过结构化方式保证计划的逻辑一致性和空间有效性，并引入闭环机制，基于反馈及时修正和重规划，确保实际执行与计划始终对齐。

Result: 在仿真和现实环境中大量实验表明，MoMaStage在长期移动操作任务中的计划成功率和任务完成率均明显优于最新主流方法，同时减少了语言模型的推理开销。

Conclusion: MoMaStage显著提升了长期移动操作的任务安全性与效果，兼顾了灵活适应性与计划执行的严谨性，为未来基于语言指令的机器人操作任务奠定了坚实基础。

Abstract: Indoor mobile manipulation (MoMA) enables robots to translate natural language instructions into physical actions, yet long-horizon execution remains challenging due to cascading errors and limited generalization across diverse environments. Learning-based approaches often fail to maintain logical consistency over extended horizons, while methods relying on explicit scene representations impose rigid structural assumptions that reduce adaptability in dynamic settings. To address these limitations, we propose MoMaStage, a structured vision-language framework for long-horizon MoMA that eliminates the need for explicit scene mapping. MoMaStage grounds a Vision-Language Model (VLM) within a Hierarchical Skill Library and a topology-aware Skill-State Graph, constraining task decomposition and skill composition within a feasible transition space. This structured grounding ensures that generated plans remain logically consistent and topologically valid with respect to the agent's evolving physical state. To enhance robustness, MoMaStage incorporates a closed-loop execution mechanism that monitors proprioceptive feedback and triggers graph-constrained semantic replanning when deviations are detected, maintaining alignment between planned skills and physical outcomes. Extensive experiments in physics-rich simulations and real-world environments demonstrate that MoMaStage outperforms state-of-the-art baselines, achieving substantially higher planning success, reducing token overhead, and significantly improving overall task success rates in long-horizon mobile manipulation. Video demonstrations are available on the project website: https://chenxuli-cxli.github.io/MoMaStage/.

</details>


### [488] [StructBiHOI: Structured Articulation Modeling for Long--Horizon Bimanual Hand--Object Interaction Generation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.08390)
*Zhi Wang,Liu Liu,Ruonan Liu,Dan Guo,Meng Wang*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 该论文提出了一种新的结构化模型StructBiHOI，实现了复杂的双手与物体交互生成，在长期序列中的稳定性、运动真实性以及计算效率上优于现有方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前3D手-物体交互生成主要集中在单手抓握，而双手操作由于协调、关节控制和长时序规划的复杂性仍很难实现。现有方法很难同时保证长序列下的时序一致性、物理合理性和语义对齐。

Method: 提出StructBiHOI结构，将时序联合规划与帧级动态细化分开处理。jointVAE用于基于物体几何和任务语义建模长时间关节变换；maniVAE负责帧级的手部动作细化。引入基于Mamba的类似状态空间扩散去噪模块，能高效建模长距离时序依赖，具备线性复杂度。

Result: 在双手操作与单手抓握基准测试上，StructBiHOI在长序列稳定性、运动真实性和计算效率等方面都优于强基线方法。

Conclusion: 该方法通过结构化分层设计实现了双手协调与精细物体操作，并在生成质量和效率上有显著提升，为实际复杂HOI任务带来新的解决方案。

Abstract: Recent progress in 3D hand--object interaction (HOI) generation has primarily focused on single--hand grasp synthesis, while bimanual manipulation remains significantly more challenging. Long--horizon planning instability, fine--grained joint articulation, and complex cross--hand coordination make coherent bimanual generation difficult, especially under multimodal conditions. Existing approaches often struggle to simultaneously ensure temporal consistency, physical plausibility, and semantic alignment over extended sequences. We propose StructBiHOI, a Structured articulation modeling framework for long-horizon Bimanual HOI generation. Our key insight is to structurally disentangle temporal joint planning from frame--level manipulation refinement. Specifically, a jointVAE models long-term joint evolution conditioned on object geometry and task semantics, while a maniVAE refines fine-grained hand poses at the single--frame level. To enable stable and efficient long--sequence generation, we incorporate a state--space--inspired diffusion denoiser based on Mamba, which models long--range dependencies with linear complexity. This hierarchical design facilitates coherent dual-hand coordination and articulated object interaction. Extensive experiments on bimanual manipulation and single-hand grasping benchmarks demonstrate that our method achieves superior long--horizon stability, motion realism, and computational efficiency compared to strong baselines.

</details>


### [489] [Human-Aware Robot Behaviour in Self-Driving Labs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.08420)
*Satheeshkumar Veeramani,Anna Kisil,Abigail Bentley,Hatem Fakhruldeen,Gabriella Pizzuto,Andrew I. Cooper*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本论文提出了一种基于AI的分层人类意图预测模型，以改善在自动化实验室中人机共用仪器时的效率和互动。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前自驱动实验室中的移动机器人化学家（MRCs）在与人类共用设备时，因缺乏情境感知而效率低下，只能被动等待人类使用完设备，导致自动化流程延误，影响整体研究效率。

Method: 提出并初步研究了一种具备人类意图感知能力的结构化AI方法，通过分层建模预测人类是在准备操作（等待）还是暂时使用仪器（使用中），从而辅助机器人做出更合理的行为决策。

Result: 实验结果显示，该方法能够让机器人主动与人类进行互动，提高人机协作效率，减少等待时间，优化整体实验室自动化流程。

Conclusion: 所提AI驱动的人类意图预测模型可有效提升自动化科学实验室的人机协作水平及效率，推动自驱动实验室的进一步智能化和实用化。

Abstract: Self-driving laboratories (SDLs) are rapidly transforming research in chemistry and materials science to accelerate new discoveries. Mobile robot chemists (MRCs) play a pivotal role by autonomously navigating the lab to transport samples, effectively connecting synthesis, analysis, and characterisation equipment. The instruments within an SDL are typically designed or retrofitted to be accessed by both human and robotic chemists, ensuring operational flexibility and integration between manual and automated workflows. In many scenarios, human and robotic chemists may need to use the same equipment simultaneously. Currently, MRCs rely on simple LiDAR-based obstruction detection, which forces the robot to passively wait if a human is present. This lack of situational awareness leads to unnecessary delays and inefficient coordination in time-critical automated workflows in human-robot shared labs. To address this, we present an initial study of an embodied, AI-driven perception method that facilitates proactive human-robot interaction in shared-access scenarios. Our method features a hierarchical human intention prediction model that allows the robot to distinguish between preparatory actions (waiting) and transient interactions (accessing the instrument). Our results demonstrate that the proposed approach enhances efficiency by enabling proactive human-robot interaction, streamlining coordination, and potentially increasing the efficiency of autonomous scientific labs.

</details>


### [490] [Tactile Recognition of Both Shapes and Materials with Automatic Feature Optimization-Enabled Meta Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.08423)
*Hongliang Zhao,Wenhui Yang,Yang Chen,Zhuorui Wang,Baiheng Liu,Longhui Qin*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出了一种AFOP-ML自动特征优化的原型网络，实现了小样本下机器人触觉识别高效泛化。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 深度学习虽然在触觉感知中有应用前景，但受限于数据稀缺且采集成本高，难以满足实际需求。提升少样本下的识别能力非常关键。

Method: 提出了AFOP-ML框架，将自动特征优化与原型网络结合，实现小样本元学习。利用触觉手指采集的四通道信号，进行形状和材质的识别。

Result: 在36类基准任务中，5-way-1-shot准确率达96.08%，36-way-1-shot场景下也有88.7%。三个独立实验进一步验证了对新类别/扰动条件的泛化能力。

Conclusion: AFOP-ML在触觉小样本识别上表现优越，同时为识别任务的解释与传感器设计提供了新思路。

Abstract: Tactile perception is indispensable for robots to implement various manipulations dexterously, especially in contact-rich scenarios. However, alongside the development of deep learning techniques, it meanwhile suffers from training data scarcity and a time-consuming learning process in practical applications since the collection of a large amount of tactile data is costly and sometimes even impossible. Hence, we propose an automatic feature optimization-enabled prototypical network to realize meta-learning, i.e., AFOP-ML framework. As a ``learn to learn" network, it not only adapts to new unseen classes rapidly with few-shot, but also learns how to determine the optimal feature space automatically. Based on the four-channel signals acquired from a tactile finger, both shapes and materials are recognized. On a 36-category benchmark, it outperforms several existing approaches by attaining an accuracy of 96.08% in 5-way-1-shot scenario, where only 1 example is available for training. It still remains 88.7% in the extreme 36-way-1-shot case. The generalization ability is further validated through three groups of experiment involving unseen shapes, materials and force/speed perturbations. More insights are additionally provided by this work for the interpretation of recognition tasks and improved design of tactile sensors.

</details>


### [491] [FoMo: A Multi-Season Dataset for Robot Navigation in Forêt Montmorency](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.08433)
*Matěj Boxan,Gabriel Jeanson,Alexander Krawciw,Effie Daum,Xinyuan Qiao,Sven Lilge,Timothy D. Barfoot,François Pomerleau*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: FoMo数据集是一套涵盖一年多季节、多传感器环境下的自动地面车辆数据，对现有视觉里程计和SLAM算法的鲁棒性挑战显著。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 自动驾驶与机器人领域在真实、多变环境下缺少高质量、多类型传感器的数据集。尤其是在极端气候多变的北方森林中，对定位建图算法的验证资源匮乏，难以支撑对环境适应性的研究。

Method: 本工作通过部署多种传感器（旋转/混合激光雷达、FMCW雷达、双目/单目摄像头、IMU和GNSS等）在无人地面车辆上，跨越一年的十二次任务，重复采集不同季节六条共64公里的路线数据，并补充气象、标定和能耗信息。通过后处理GNSS数据获得精确的定位真值。

Result: 初步评测了激光-惯性、雷达-陀螺和视觉-惯性SLAM方案，对比展示了这些主流方法在显著季节变化环境下重定位能力的严重下滑。

Conclusion: FoMo数据集揭示了主流里程计和SLAM方法在多变自然环境下的局限，为开发更鲁棒的重定位和建图算法提供了宝贵资源。

Abstract: The Forêt Montmorency (FoMo) dataset is a comprehensive multi-season data collection, recorded over the span of one year in a boreal forest. Featuring a unique combination of on- and off-pavement environments with significant environmental changes, the dataset challenges established odometry and SLAM pipelines. Some highlights of the data include the accumulation of snow exceeding 1 m, significant vegetation growth in front of sensors, and operations at the traction limits of the platform. In total, the FoMo dataset includes over 64 km of six diverse trajectories, repeated during 12 deployments throughout the year. The dataset features data from one rotating and one hybrid solid-state lidar, a Frequency Modulated Continuous Wave (FMCW) radar, full-HD images from a stereo camera and a wide lens monocular camera, as well as data from two IMUs. Ground Truth is calculated by post-processing three GNSS receivers mounted on the Uncrewed Ground Vehicle (UGV) and a static GNSS base station. Additional metadata, such as one measurement per minute from an on-site weather station, camera calibration intrinsics, and vehicle power consumption, is available for all sequences. To highlight the relevance of the dataset, we performed a preliminary evaluation of the robustness of a lidar-inertial, radar-gyro, and a visual-inertial localization and mapping techniques to seasonal changes. We show that seasonal changes have serious effects on the re-localization capabilities of the state-of-the-art methods. The dataset and development kit are available at https://fomo.norlab.ulaval.ca.

</details>


### [492] [Adaptive Entropy-Driven Sensor Selection in a Camera-LiDAR Particle Filter for Single-Vessel Tracking](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.08457)
*Andrei Starodubov,Yaqub Aris Prabowo,Andreas Hadjipieris,Ioannis Kyriakides,Roberto Galeazzi*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 该论文提出了一种基于信息增益自适应传感策略的多传感器融合粒子滤波追踪器，实现了在海岸平台对单船目标的鲁棒追踪，有效结合了摄像头与激光雷达等传感器优势。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 固定岸基平台上的单船追踪受到传感器本身限制：摄像头易受光照与杂波影响，激光雷达远距离与回波不稳定时性能下降。亟需提升鲁棒性和准确性的多传感器融合技术，应对复杂多变的海上环境。

Method: 提出了一种异构多传感器（3D激光雷达和固定式摄像头）融合的粒子滤波器追踪方法，并引入基于信息增益（熵降低）的自适应传感策略，在每个融合时刻动态选择最有信息量的传感器组合。

Result: 在实际海事测试床部署下，比较了激光雷达单用、摄像头单用、全传感器及自适应配置：近距离激光雷达效果最佳，远距离激光雷达失效时摄像头维持追踪，自适应配置能根据信息量切换传感器，兼顾精度与覆盖连续性。

Conclusion: 自适应多传感器融合策略在不连续处理多路数据的基础上，实现了鲁棒且高效的岸基单船追踪，为资源受限条件下的海事监控系统提供了实用基线。

Abstract: Robust single-vessel tracking from fixed coastal platforms is hindered by modality-specific degradations: cameras suffer from illumination and visual clutter, while LiDAR performance drops with range and intermittent returns. We present a heterogeneous multi-sensor fusion particle-filter tracker that incorporates an information-gain (entropy-reduction) adaptive sensing policy to select the most informative configuration at each fusion time bin. The approach is validated in a real maritime deployment at the CMMI Smart Marina Testbed (Ayia Napa Marina, Cyprus), using a shore-mounted 3D LiDAR and an elevated fixed camera to track a rigid inflatable boat with onboard GNSS ground truth. We compare LiDAR-only, camera-only, all-sensors, and adaptive configurations. Results show LiDAR dominates near-field accuracy, the camera sustains longer-range coverage when LiDAR becomes unavailable, and the adaptive policy achieves a favorable accuracy-continuity trade-off by switching modalities based on information gain. By avoiding continuous multi-stream processing, the adaptive configuration provides a practical baseline for resilient and resource-aware maritime surveillance.

</details>


### [493] [R2F: Repurposing Ray Frontiers for LLM-free Object Navigation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.08475)
*Francesco Argenziano,John Mark Alexis Marcelo,Michele Brienza,Abdel Hakim Drid,Emanuele Musumeci,Daniele Nardi,Domenico D. Bloisi,Vincenzo Suriani*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本论文提出了一种无需大型语言模型（LLM）推理的全新开集目标导航方法，在保持零样本泛化能力的同时，大幅提升了导航系统推理速度。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于视觉-语言模型（VLM）和大型语言模型（LLM）的零样本目标导航系统，在实时部署时，由于推理阶段反复调用大模型，计算开销和延迟很高，限制了应用。本研究意图寻求一种快速、轻量且高效的解决方案。

Method: 论文重新定义并改进了射线前沿（Ray Frontier, R2F）方法，将前沿区域视为带有方向的语义假设目标。系统结合嵌入式特征存储方式和传统地图/规划流程，用低计算量的嵌入评分与目标跟踪，取代了大型模型推理。为支持自由格式的语言指令，作者还提出了R2F-VLN扩展，利用句法解析和关系验证，无需额外的VLM或LLM。

Result: 在模拟环境（Habitat-sim）及真实机器人平台上，方法达到了与现有最优VLM/LLM系统相当的零样本导航效果，且推理速度提升至对比系统的6倍。

Conclusion: 提出的方法显著提升了开集目标导航的实时性和实用性，减少计算资源依赖，为实际机器人自主导航奠定了更加高效、经济的技术基础。

Abstract: Zero-shot open-vocabulary object navigation has progressed rapidly with the emergence of large Vision-Language Models (VLMs) and Large Language Models (LLMs), now widely used as high-level decision-makers instead of end-to-end policies. Although effective, such systems often rely on iterative large-model queries at inference time, introducing latency and computational overhead that limit real-time deployment. To address this problem, we repurpose ray frontiers (R2F), a recently proposed frontier-based exploration paradigm, to develop an LLM-free framework for indoor open-vocabulary object navigation. While ray frontiers were originally used to bias exploration using semantic cues carried along rays, we reinterpret frontier regions as explicit, direction-conditioned semantic hypotheses that serve as navigation goals. Language-aligned features accumulated along out-of-range rays are stored sparsely at frontiers, where each region maintains multiple directional embeddings encoding plausible unseen content. In this way, navigation then reduces to embedding-based frontier scoring and goal tracking within a classical mapping and planning pipeline, eliminating iterative large-model reasoning. We further introduce R2F-VLN, a lightweight extension for free-form language instructions using syntactic parsing and relational verification without additional VLM or LLM components. Experiments in Habitat-sim and on a real robotic platform demonstrate competitive state-of-the-art zero-shot performance with real-time execution, achieving up to 6 times faster runtime than VLM-based alternatives.

</details>


### [494] [LAR-MoE: Latent-Aligned Routing for Mixture of Experts in Robotic Imitation Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.08476)
*Ariel Rodriguez,Chenpan Li,Lorenzo Mazza,Rayan Younis,Ortrun Hellig,Sebastian Bodenstedt,Martin Wagner,Stefanie Speidel*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种新的模仿学习方法LAR-MoE，在多任务异构动态下实现高效、结构化的专家路由，无需人工划分技能阶段。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统模仿学习模型在多任务场景下因行为模式异构容易出现模型平均，导致表现不佳；Mixture-of-Experts架构虽可缓解但需手动技能划分，适应性有限。

Method: 本文提出两阶段LAR-MoE框架：第一阶段利用学生-教师协同训练，无监督方式学习观测与未来动作的联合潜在表示；第二阶段中，利用所学潜在空间结构引导专家路由，从而防止专家崩溃，并提升参数效率。

Result: 在模拟和真实机器人硬件上评估LAR-MoE：LIBERO基准测试中，其150M参数模型达95.2%平均成功率；在手术肠道抓取与牵引任务中，LAR-MoE无需人工阶段标注即可匹配有监督MoE基线，并实现零样本迁移到猪离体组织。

Conclusion: LAR-MoE通过对专家路由的潜在空间对齐，有效避免需要有监督技能拆分，为无需标签演示下的专家结构化分工提供了有效方案。

Abstract: Imitation learning enables robots to acquire manipulation skills from demonstrations, yet deploying a policy across tasks with heterogeneous dynamics remains challenging, as models tend to average over distinct behavioral modes present in the demonstrations. Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) architectures address this by activating specialized subnetworks, but requires meaningful skill decompositions for expert routing. We introduce Latent-Aligned Routing for Mixture of Experts (LAR-MoE), a two-stage framework that decouples unsupervised skill discovery from policy learning. In pre-training, we learn a joint latent representation between observations and future actions through student-teacher co-training. In a post-training stage, the expert routing is regularized to follow the structure of the learned latent space, preventing expert collapse while maintaining parameter efficiency. We evaluate LAR-MoE in simulation and on hardware. On the LIBERO benchmark, our method achieves a 95.2% average success rate with 150M parameters. On a surgical bowel grasping and retraction task, LAR-MoE matches a supervised MoE baseline without requiring any phase annotations, and transfers zero-shot to ex vivo porcine tissue. Our findings suggest that latent-aligned routing provides a principled alternative to supervised skill decomposition, enabling structured expert specialization from unlabeled demonstrations.

</details>


### [495] [STRIDE: Structured Lagrangian and Stochastic Residual Dynamics via Flow Matching](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.08478)
*Prakrut Kotecha,Ganga Nair B,Shishir Kolathaya*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出了一种将刚体力学与概率交互建模结合的动力学学习框架STRIDE，实现了在复杂不确定环境下更精确的机器人动力学预测。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的刚体解析模型虽具物理一致性，但对复杂交互建模欠佳；纯数据驱动模型易违背物理法则、数据偏差显著且预测时易漂移。为满足实际部署时对建模可靠性与可解释性的双重需求，亟需兼顾物理结构和高阶交互复杂度的动力学建模新方案。

Method: STRIDE 框架将动力学建模分为两部分：保守的刚体力学部分用 Lagrangian Neural Network（LNN）建模确保动力学与能量守恒相符；对不确定的、非保守的交互残差用 Conditional Flow Matching (CFM) 概率建模以捕捉多模态、随机性强的复杂动力学效应。两者统一端到端联合训练。

Result: 在多套复杂程度递增的机器人系统（如摆、四足机器人、类人机器人）上的实验显示，STRIDE 在长期预测误差上比传统确定性残差方法降低20%，在接触力预测误差上降低30%。

Conclusion: STRIDE 有效兼顾了物理一致性与复杂交互的高精度建模，提升了不确定环境下机器人的可靠性，可为基于模型的机器人控制带来更优结果。

Abstract: Robotic systems operating in unstructured environments must operate under significant uncertainty arising from intermittent contacts, frictional variability, and unmodeled compliance. While recent model-free approaches have demonstrated impressive performance, many deployment settings still require predictive models that support planning, constraint handling, and online adaptation. Analytical rigid-body models provide strong physical structure but often fail to capture complex interaction effects, whereas purely data-driven models may violate physical consistency, exhibit data bias, and accumulate long-horizon drift. In this work, we propose STRIDE, a dynamics learning framework that explicitly separates conservative rigid-body mechanics from uncertain, effectively stochastic non-conservative interaction effects. The structured component is modeled using a Lagrangian Neural Network (LNN) to preserve energy-consistent inertial dynamics, while residual interaction forces are represented using Conditional Flow Matching (CFM) to capture multi-modal interaction phenomena. The two components are trained jointly end-to-end, enabling the model to retain physical structure while representing complex stochastic behavior. We evaluate STRIDE on systems of increasing complexity, including a pendulum, the Unitree Go1 quadruped, and the Unitree G1 humanoid. Results show 20% reduction in long-horizon prediction error and 30% reduction in contact force prediction error compared to deterministic residual baselines, supporting more reliable model-based control in uncertain robotic environments.

</details>


### [496] [3PoinTr: 3D Point Tracks for Robot Manipulation Pretraining from Casual Videos](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.08485)
*Adam Hung,Bardienus Pieter Duisterhof,Jeffrey Ichnowski*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出一种名为3PoinTr的新方法，能够从非约束的自然人类视频中预训练机器人策略，实现数据高效、鲁棒的操作任务学习，显著减少人为示范的需求，并优于现有方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有机器人策略学习通常需要大量的人工演示，代价高昂且不现实。直接从普通人类视频中学习可以免去遥操作的成本，但由于“具身差异”，需要刻意规范人类动作，限制了实际应用。本文动机在于发展一种能直接从自然人类视频学习、且具身无关的数据高效预训练策略，提高泛化能力，降低数据和人工成本。

Method: 提出了3PoinTr方法，利用Transformer架构，从人类视频中预测3D点轨迹，作为机器人动作策略的中间具身无关表征。这些点轨迹编码了目标设定、场景结构和时空关系。再结合Perceiver IO架构提取紧凑表征，实现高效的行为克隆，即使点轨迹与机器人本体限制有偏差。该方法采用部分遮挡点保持监督的训练方式。

Result: 在仿真和实际场景的多类操作任务中评估3PoinTr。结果显示在仅有20条动作标注机器人演示的情况下，3PoinTr在空间泛化和任务鲁棒性上优于包括行为克隆和以往从人类视频预训练的基线方法，在点轨迹预测精度和质量上也优于现有基线。

Conclusion: 3PoinTr实现从非规约人类视频高效预训练机器人，具身无关、高鲁棒性与强泛化能力，显著提升机器人通过人类视频快速学习任务能力，为降低数据和人工成本、拓展机器人应用场景提供了新的方案。

Abstract: Data-efficient training of robust robot policies is the key to unlocking automation in a wide array of novel tasks. Current systems require large volumes of demonstrations to achieve robustness, which is impractical in many applications. Learning policies directly from human videos is a promising alternative that removes teleoperation costs, but it shifts the challenge toward overcoming the embodiment gap (differences in kinematics and strategies between robots and humans), often requiring restrictive and carefully choreographed human motions. We propose 3PoinTr, a method for pretraining robot policies from casual and unconstrained human videos, enabling learning from motions natural for humans. 3PoinTr uses a transformer architecture to predict 3D point tracks as an intermediate embodiment-agnostic representation. 3D point tracks encode goal specifications, scene geometry, and spatiotemporal relationships. We use a Perceiver IO architecture to extract a compact representation for sample-efficient behavior cloning, even when point tracks violate downstream embodiment-specific constraints. We conduct thorough evaluation on simulated and real-world tasks, and find that 3PoinTr achieves robust spatial generalization on diverse categories of manipulation tasks with only 20 action-labeled robot demonstrations. 3PoinTr outperforms the baselines, including behavior cloning methods, as well as prior methods for pretraining from human videos. We also provide evaluations of 3PoinTr's 3D point track predictions compared to an existing point track prediction baseline. We find that 3PoinTr produces more accurate and higher quality point tracks due to a lightweight yet expressive architecture built on a single transformer, in addition to a training formulation that preserves supervision of partially occluded points. Project page: https://adamhung60.github.io/3PoinTr/.

</details>


### [497] [An Open-Source Robotics Research Platform for Autonomous Laparoscopic Surgery](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.08490)
*Ariel Rodriguez,Lorenzo Mazza,Martin Lelis,Rayan Younis,Sebastian Bodenstedt,Martin Wagner,Stefanie Speidel*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种开源、平台无关的RCM控制器，能够实现高精度的自主化微创手术，同时解决了现有平台机械限制带来的问题。该系统在多种机械臂和实际手术情境下验证，展示了优异的精度和轨迹平滑性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 目前用于自主机器人辅助手术的研究平台多基于达芬奇研究套件，然而其线缆驱动结构存在机械和一致性瓶颈，影响自主策略训练与执行的可靠性。因此，亟需一种克服现有限制、能普适应用于多种机械臂且满足高安全高精度要求的平台。

Method: 作者提出了一种基于解析速度解算器的RCM（远程运动中心）控制器，可在无需迭代优化的情况下严格实现套管针约束。该控制器以笛卡尔空间为基础，可以轻松集成进任何工业机械臂。文中以UR5e和Franka Emika Panda机械臂为例实现了该系统，集成了立体三维感知，并通过ROS整合了远程操作、示范记录、策略部署等功能，采用去耦的服务端-客户端架构。

Result: 系统在模型、离体及活体猪腹腔镜操作任务（肠道抓取与牵拉）中进行了验证。RCM偏差始终控制在亚毫米级，轨迹平滑性（SPARC、LDLJ指标）与基于da Vinci系统的专家示范持平。

Conclusion: 该平台克服了现有系统机械结构瓶颈，具备高精度、强鲁棒性，能够胜任远程操作、数据采集和自主策略部署，满足现实外科手术应用需求。

Abstract: Autonomous robot-assisted surgery demands reliable, high-precision platforms that strictly adhere to the safety and kinematic constraints of minimally invasive procedures. Existing research platforms, primarily based on the da Vinci Research Kit, suffer from cable-driven mechanical limitations that degrade state-space consistency and hinder the downstream training of reliable autonomous policies. We present an open-source, robot-agnostic Remote Center of Motion (RCM) controller based on a closed-form analytical velocity solver that enforces the trocar constraint deterministically without iterative optimization. The controller operates in Cartesian space, enabling any industrial manipulator to function as a surgical robot. We provide implementations for the UR5e and Franka Emika Panda manipulators, and integrate stereoscopic 3D perception. We integrate the robot control into a full-stack ROS-based surgical robotics platform supporting teleoperation, demonstration recording, and deployment of learned policies via a decoupled server-client architecture. We validate the system on a bowel grasping and retraction task across phantom, ex vivo, and in vivo porcine laparoscopic procedures. RCM deviations remain sub-millimeter across all conditions, and trajectory smoothness metrics (SPARC, LDLJ) are comparable to expert demonstrations from the JIGSAWS benchmark recorded on the da Vinci system. These results demonstrate that the platform provides the precision and robustness required for teleoperation, data collection and autonomous policy deployment in realistic surgical scenarios.

</details>


### [498] [Rethinking the semantic classification of indoor places by mobile robots](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.08512)
*Oscar Martinez Mozos,Alejandra C. Hernandez,Clara Gomez,Ramon Barber*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文针对服务机器人在理解环境语义上的挑战，提出了一种允许房间内部标签混淆的新范式，以适应不同区域的多样用途，并在物体搜索任务中进行了验证。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前服务机器人对环境的语义理解通常基于将房间整体划分和标签指定，难以反映一个房间内不同区域的实际多样用途，导致标签与现实不符。

Method: 作者提出有意放宽房间内部语义标签的一致性，允许在同一个房间内根据不同区域的使用方式产生标签混淆，并将此思想用于提升机器人在物体搜索任务中的表现。

Result: 通过实验性验证，展示了允许标签混淆能够实际为服务机器人在查找物体时带来益处。

Conclusion: 适当的语义标签混淆可以帮助机器人更灵活地理解和适应环境，提高服务效率。

Abstract: A significant challenge in service robots is the semantic understanding of their surrounding areas. Traditional approaches addressed this problem by segmenting the floor plan into regions corresponding to full rooms that are assigned labels consistent with human perception, e.g. office or kitchen. However, different areas inside the same room can be used in different ways: Could the table and the chair in my kitchen become my office? What is the category of that area now? office or kitchen? To adapt to these circumstances we propose a new paradigm where we intentionally relax the resulting labeling of semantic classifiers by allowing confusions inside rooms. Our hypothesis is that those confusions can be beneficial to a service robot. We present a proof of concept in the task of searching for objects.

</details>


### [499] [AtomVLA: Scalable Post-Training for Robotic Manipulation via Predictive Latent World Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.08519)
*Xiaoquan Sun,Zetian Xu,Chen Cao,Zonghe Liu,Yihan Sun,Jingrui Pang,Ruijian Zhang,Zhen Yang,Kang Pang,Dingxin He,Mingqi Yuan,Jiayu Chen*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本论文提出了AtomVLA，一个具备子任务感知能力的视觉-语言-动作（VLA）模型，并结合可扩展的离线后期训练流程，以提升长任务序列中的操作稳健性。其核心在于高效分解与评分子任务，提高多步骤操控任务的执行效果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有VLA模型在处理复杂、多步骤任务时，缺乏对中间指令的明确关联，导致错误累积，尤其在长任务序列下表现不佳。为解决VLA模型在长期任务指令落地和实际执行中的差距，研究迫切需要一种能缩小指导空窗期、提升模型泛化和鲁棒性的方案。

Method: 作者提出了AtomVLA框架。首先用大语言模型将高层任务演示细化为原子子任务，然后利用预训练的世界预测模型，在潜在空间对候选动作片段根据子任务目标打分，从而减轻错误累积。此外，该方法采用高效的组相对策略优化，无需昂贵的在线真实机器人试验，大幅提升了训练效率。

Result: AtomVLA在LIBERO基准任务上取得平均97%的成功率，在更具挑战性的LIBERO-PRO基准上达到48%的成功率。仿真实验表明其鲁棒性极强，实际机器人测试也验证了其在多样且长周期任务中的广泛适用性。

Conclusion: AtomVLA弥补了现有VLA模型在长任务执行中指令衔接的不足，有效减少误差积累，提升了复杂任务下的操作表现。该框架适用于多样场景，适合未来视觉-语言-动作模型的研究和实际推广。数据、模型和代码将在论文录用后公开，为社区提供资源。

Abstract: Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models demonstrate remarkable potential for generalizable robotic manipulation. The execution of complex multi-step behaviors in VLA models can be improved by robust instruction grounding, a critical component for effective control. However, current paradigms predominantly rely on coarse, high-level task instructions during supervised fine-tuning. This instruction grounding gap leaves models without explicit intermediate guidance, leading to severe compounding errors in long-horizon tasks. Therefore, bridging this instruction gap and providing scalable post-training for VLA models is urgent. To tackle this problem, we propose \method, the first subtask-aware VLA framework integrated with a scalable offline post-training pipeline. Our framework leverages a large language model to decompose high-level demonstrations into fine-grained atomic subtasks. This approach utilizes a pretrained predictive world model to score candidate action chunks against subtask goals in the latent space, mitigating error accumulation while significantly improving long-horizon robustness. Furthermore, this approach enables highly efficient Group Relative Policy Optimization without the prohibitive expenses associated with online rollouts on physical robots. Extensive simulations validate that our AtomVLA maintains strong robustness under perturbations. When evaluated against fundamental baseline models, it achieves an average success rate of 97.0\% on the LIBERO benchmark and 48.0\% on the LIBERO-PRO benchmark. Finally, experiments conducted in the real world using the Galaxea R1 Lite platform confirm its broad applicability across diverse tasks, especially long-horizon tasks. All datasets, checkpoints, and code will be released to the public domain following the acceptance of this work for future research.

</details>


### [500] [CRED: Counterfactual Reasoning and Environment Design for Active Preference Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.08531)
*Yi-Shiuan Tung,Gyanig Kumar,Wei Jiang,Bradley Hayes,Alessandro Roncone*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出一种新的主动偏好学习方法CRED，能够通过联合优化环境设计和轨迹选择，高效获取用户偏好，显著提升奖励函数的学习效果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 随着机器人的应用场景和任务日益复杂，直接指定和权衡多元优化目标变得不可行，因此需要通过主动学习用户偏好来指导机器人行为。现有的主动偏好学习大多依赖固定轨迹集，难以获取丰富且有效的用户反馈。

Method: 作者提出了一种称为CRED的新方法，创新性地将环境设计与轨迹生成结合起来，通过反事实推理主动构造能够区分不同奖励函数的轨迹对，极大提升了偏好的查询效率和信息量。CRED会设想不同场景并针对当前对用户偏好的信念采样奖励，从而设计出有助于学习的对比案例。

Result: 大量实验和用户研究显示，CRED在奖励精度和样本效率上均显著优于当前主流方法，并且用户主观评价更高。

Conclusion: CRED方法能够更好地推断用户的真实偏好，提高机器人行为的自主适应能力，对提升复杂环境中的人机协作效果有重要意义。

Abstract: As a robot's operational environment and tasks to perform within it grow in complexity, the explicit specification and balancing of optimization objectives to achieve a preferred behavior profile moves increasingly farther out of reach. These systems benefit strongly by being able to align their behavior to reflect human preferences and respond to corrections, but manually encoding this feedback is infeasible. Active preference learning (APL) learns human reward functions by presenting trajectories for ranking. However, existing methods sample from fixed trajectory sets or replay buffers that limit query diversity and often fail to identify informative comparisons. We propose CRED, a novel trajectory generation method for APL that improves reward inference by jointly optimizing environment design and trajectory selection to efficiently query and extract preferences from users. CRED "imagines" new scenarios through environment design and leverages counterfactual reasoning -- by sampling possible rewards from its current belief and asking "What if this were the true preference?" -- to generate trajectory pairs that expose differences between competing reward functions. Comprehensive experiments and a user study show that CRED significantly outperforms state-of-the-art methods in reward accuracy and sample efficiency and receives higher user ratings.

</details>


### [501] [EquiBim: Learning Symmetry-Equivariant Policy for Bimanual Manipulation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.08541)
*Zhiyuan Zhang,Aditya Mohan,Seungho Han,Wan Shou,Dongyi Wang,Yu She*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种名为EquiBim的对双臂机器人操作任务物理对称性敏感的仿射学习方法，实验显示显著提升了鲁棒性和性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的仿生学习方法往往忽略了机器人系统本身的物理对称性，导致在对称观测条件下行为表现不一致、不对称。这种问题在双臂机器人场景下尤其突出，因此需要方法显式地引入和利用物理对称性。

Method: 作者提出了EquiBim框架，通过把物理对称性建模为观测和动作空间上的群作用，在训练过程中对策略预测强制实施对称约束。该方法具有很强的通用性，可无缝整合到点云、图像等多种观测模态和动作空间的仿生学习系统中。

Result: 在对称运动学结构的RoboTwin双臂机器人仿真和实际物理实验中，该方法在多种观测和动作配置下均表现出了更好的性能和鲁棒性，尤其是在分布偏移条件下更为稳定。

Conclusion: 主动引入物理对称性约束为双臂仿生学习带来了显著效益，是简单且有效的归纳偏置策略，推动了机器人仿生学习方法的发展。

Abstract: Robotic imitation learning has achieved impressive success in learning complex manipulation behaviors from demonstrations. However, many existing robot learning methods do not explicitly account for the physical symmetries of robotic systems, often resulting in asymmetric or inconsistent behaviors under symmetric observations. This limitation is particularly pronounced in dual-arm manipulation, where bilateral symmetry is inherent to both the robot morphology and the structure of many tasks. In this paper, we introduce EquiBim, a symmetry-equivariant policy learning framework for bimanual manipulation that enforces bilateral equivariance between observations and actions during training. Our approach formulates physical symmetry as a group action on both observation and action spaces, and imposes an equivariance constraint on policy predictions under symmetric transformations. The framework is model-agnostic and can be seamlessly integrated into a wide range of imitation learning pipelines with diverse observation modalities and action representations, including point cloud-based and image-based policies, as well as both end-effector-space and joint-space parameterizations. We evaluate EquiBim on RoboTwin, a dual-arm robotic platform with symmetric kinematics, and evaluate it across diverse observation and action configurations in simulation. We further validate the approach on a real-world dual-arm system. Across both simulation and physical experiments, our method consistently improves performance and robustness under distribution shifts. These results suggest that explicitly enforcing physical symmetry provides a simple yet effective inductive bias for bimanual robot learning.

</details>


### [502] [The Neural Compass: Probabilistic Relative Feature Fields for Robotic Search](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.08544)
*Gabriele Somaschini,Adrian Röfer,Abhinav Valada*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种无需标注数据即可学习物体共现关系的新模型ProReFF，并在物体搜索任务中展示了其有效性，表现优于特征基线并接近人类水平。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 大多数人工智能系统学习物体共现关系时依赖明确标注或语言模型，但尚不清楚这些关系能否仅通过无标签观测数据隐式学习。该工作旨在解决这一问题，实现无需监督的数据驱动知识获取。

Method: 提出了ProReFF特征场模型，从预训练视觉语言模型提取特征，训练模型预测相对特征分布。为应对无标签和矛盾观测，设计了一套学习策略，通过对齐矛盾观测获取一致的分布表达。在物体搜索应用中，开发了利用相对特征分布作为语义先验引导探索的智能体。

Result: 实验结果显示，ProReFF能够在自然场景中建模有意义的特征分布，对齐策略有效提升了分布一致性。于Matterport3D虚拟环境100项挑战中，提出的智能体效率比最优基线高20%，可达人类表现的80%。

Conclusion: 无监督方式下通过特征分布学习物体共现关系是可行且有效的，ProReFF可为物体搜索等场景提供有用语义先验，有望拓展至更多任务。

Abstract: Object co-occurrences provide a key cue for finding objects successfully and efficiently in unfamiliar environments. Typically, one looks for cups in kitchens and views fridges as evidence of being in a kitchen. Such priors have also been exploited in artificial agents, but they are typically learned from explicitly labeled data or queried from language models. It is still unclear whether these relations can be learned implicitly from unlabeled observations alone. In this work, we address this problem and propose ProReFF, a feature field model trained to predict relative distributions of features obtained from pre-trained vision language models. In addition, we introduce a learning-based strategy that enables training from unlabeled and potentially contradictory data by aligning inconsistent observations into a coherent relative distribution. For the downstream object search task, we propose an agent that leverages predicted feature distributions as a semantic prior to guide exploration toward regions with a high likelihood of containing the object. We present extensive evaluations demonstrating that ProReFF captures meaningful relative feature distributions in natural scenes and provides insight into the impact of our proposed alignment step. We further evaluate the performance of our search agent in 100 challenges in the Matterport3D simulator, comparing with feature-based baselines and human participants. The proposed agent is 20% more efficient than the strongest baseline and achieves up to 80% of human performance.

</details>


### [503] [Interactive World Simulator for Robot Policy Training and Evaluation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.08546)
*Yixuan Wang,Rhythm Syed,Fangyu Wu,Mengchao Zhang,Aykut Onol,Jose Barreiros,Hooshang Nayyeri,Tony Dear,Huan Zhang,Yunzhu Li*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种名为Interactive World Simulator的交互式世界模型框架，可高效、稳定地进行可扩展的机器人数据生成和策略评估。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的动作条件视频预测世界模型在机器人任务中前景良好，但推断速度慢且长时序下物理一致性不足，限制了其在大规模策略训练和评估中的应用。

Method: 利用一致性模型分别对图像解码和潜空间动力学预测进行建模，从中等规模的机器人交互数据集训练高效、稳定的世界模型，实现像素级、交互一致的长期物理交互模拟。

Result: 模型能在单张RTX 4090显卡上以15FPS模拟超过10分钟的稳定交互，生成的演示数据可直接训练模仿策略，其在仿真和现实世界任务中的表现与真实数据训练者相当，且仿真与现实的表现高度相关。

Conclusion: Interactive World Simulator为机器人数据生成和策略评估提供了稳定、物理一致的替代方案，具备可扩展性和高度的现实可复现性。

Abstract: Action-conditioned video prediction models (often referred to as world models) have shown strong potential for robotics applications, but existing approaches are often slow and struggle to capture physically consistent interactions over long horizons, limiting their usefulness for scalable robot policy training and evaluation. We present Interactive World Simulator, a framework for building interactive world models from a moderate-sized robot interaction dataset. Our approach leverages consistency models for both image decoding and latent-space dynamics prediction, enabling fast and stable simulation of physical interactions. In our experiments, the learned world models produce interaction-consistent pixel-level predictions and support stable long-horizon interactions for more than 10 minutes at 15 FPS on a single RTX 4090 GPU. Our framework enables scalable demonstration collection solely within the world models to train state-of-the-art imitation policies. Through extensive real-world evaluation across diverse tasks involving rigid objects, deformable objects, object piles, and their interactions, we find that policies trained on world-model-generated data perform comparably to those trained on the same amount of real-world data. Additionally, we evaluate policies both within the world models and in the real world across diverse tasks, and observe a strong correlation between simulated and real-world performance. Together, these results establish the Interactive World Simulator as a stable and physically consistent surrogate for scalable robotic data generation and faithful, reproducible policy evaluation.

</details>


### [504] [CONTACT: CONtact-aware TACTile Learning for Robotic Disassembly](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.08560)
*Yosuke Saka,Jyun-Chi Hu,Adeesh Desai,Zhiyuan Zhang,Bihao Zhang,Quan Khanh Luu,Md Rakibul Islam Prince,Minghui Zheng,Yu She*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文系统性地研究了触觉传感在机器人拆解任务中的作用，发现基于力场的触觉感知在结构复杂、接触主导和易变形场景下显著提高了操作成功率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 机器人拆解任务中，不仅需要精确的几何对齐，还高度依赖于力的反馈。而现有的基于视觉的方法在紧密配合和接触主导场景中表现不佳。因此，探索触觉信息是否能补足视觉的不足对提升机器人实际操作能力具有重要意义。

Method: 构建了五个仿真刚体拆卸任务，逐步增加几何约束和拆卸难度；并设计了包含刚体和易变形体的五个真实世界任务，比较了三种感知配置（仅视觉、视觉+触觉RGB、视觉+触觉力场）的效果，统一在同一学习框架下评估。

Result: 无论在仿真还是现实实验中，基于触觉力场（TacFF）的策略都取得了最高的任务成功率，尤其在接触依赖和可变形场景中表现突出。此外，简单融合触觉RGB与力场反而会稀释关键信息，效果不佳。

Conclusion: 触觉，特别是结构化力场表达，对机器人拆卸复杂接触场景至关重要，能有效提升操作成功率。与视觉信息的有效融合需谨慎设计，简单拼接不一定优于单独使用。

Abstract: Robotic disassembly involves contact-rich interactions in which successful manipulation depends not only on geometric alignment but also on force-dependent state transitions. While vision-based policies perform well in structured settings, their reliability often degrades in tight-tolerance, contact-dominated, or deformable scenarios. In this work, we systematically investigate the role of tactile sensing in robotic disassembly through both simulation and real-world experiments. We construct five rigid-body disassembly tasks in simulation with increasing geometric constraints and extraction difficulty. We further design five real-world tasks, including three rigid and two deformable scenarios, to evaluate contact-dependent manipulation. Within a unified learning framework, we compare three sensing configurations: Vision Only, Vision + tactile RGB (TacRGB), and Vision + tactile force field (TacFF). Across both simulation and real-world experiments, TacFF-based policies consistently achieve the highest success rates, with particularly notable gains in contact-dependent and deformable settings. Notably, naive fusion of TacRGB and TacFF underperforms either modality alone, indicating that simple concatenation can dilute task-relevant force information. Our results show that tactile sensing plays a critical, task-dependent role in robotic disassembly, with structured force-field representations being particularly effective in contact-dominated scenarios.

</details>


### [505] [MetaWorld-X: Hierarchical World Modeling via VLM-Orchestrated Experts for Humanoid Loco-Manipulation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.08572)
*Yutong Shen,Hangxu Liu,Penghui Liu,Jiashuo Luo,Yongkang Zhang,Rex Morvley,Chen Jiang,Jianwei Zhang,Lei Zhang*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出MetaWorld-X，一种分层世界模型，通过将复杂的人形机器人全身控制任务分解为多个专家政策，并利用视觉语言模型动态融合，实现自然、稳定且具泛化能力的运动与操作。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有强化学习方法用单一策略处理多技能，易导致高自由度系统技能干扰和动作冲突，难以实现自然、稳定和可泛化的人形机器人全身控制，特别是在同时行走和操作时。

Method: 采用分而治之思想，将任务分为多个专业专家策略，每个策略通过模仿受限强化学习借助人体运动先验训练，确保动作自然、合乎生物力学；另外通过智能路由机制，利用视觉语言模型根据任务语义动态组合专家策略，实现高层次、适应性强的任务执行。

Result: 该分层方法能够生成动作自然、稳定，并能适应复杂、多阶段任务组合的控制策略。语义驱动的专家融合机制提升了泛化能力和自适应能力。

Conclusion: MetaWorld-X实现了人形机器人在复杂 loco-manipulation 任务中运动与操作的自然性、稳定性和组合泛化性，为全身智能控制提供了一种高效、可扩展的解决方案。

Abstract: Learning natural, stable, and compositionally generalizable whole-body control policies for humanoid robots performing simultaneous locomotion and manipulation (loco-manipulation) remains a fundamental challenge in robotics. Existing reinforcement learning approaches typically rely on a single monolithic policy to acquire multiple skills, which often leads to cross-skill gradient interference and motion pattern conflicts in high-degree-of-freedom systems. As a result, generated behaviors frequently exhibit unnatural movements, limited stability, and poor generalization to complex task compositions. To address these limitations, we propose MetaWorld-X, a hierarchical world model framework for humanoid control. Guided by a divide-and-conquer principle, our method decomposes complex control problems into a set of specialized expert policies (Specialized Expert Policies, SEP). Each expert is trained under human motion priors through imitation-constrained reinforcement learning, introducing biomechanically consistent inductive biases that ensure natural and physically plausible motion generation. Building upon this foundation, we further develop an Intelligent Routing Mechanism (IRM) supervised by a Vision-Language Model (VLM), enabling semantic-driven expert composition. The VLM-guided router dynamically integrates expert policies according to high-level task semantics, facilitating compositional generalization and adaptive execution in multi-stage loco-manipulation tasks.

</details>


### [506] [Bilevel Planning with Learned Symbolic Abstractions from Interaction Data](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.08599)
*Fatih Dogangun,Burcu Kilic,Serdar Bahar,Emre Ugur*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种双层神经符号框架，将符号规则和连续效果模型结合，用于在复杂环境下高效且准确地规划机器人动作，不仅提升了计划效率，也提升了计划可验证性和实用性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的方法虽然能通过神经网络自监督学习得到符号抽象，但通常只适用于确定性离散领域，且缺乏对生成计划的验证机制，对连续动态环境的把握不足，实际应用中存在局限。

Method: 框架分为高层和低层：高层通过学习得到的概率符号规则，快速生成备选计划；低层通过连续效果模型对这些计划验证，并在必要时做进一步的前向搜索。即用高效的符号推理来指导，但用连续具体模拟来保证准确。

Result: 在多物体操作任务测试中，该方法在识别失效计划和整体规划性能上显著优于传统符号方法，并在大多数情况下以仅符号水平的推理速度实现了接近连续前向搜索的效果。

Conclusion: 双层神经符号方法兼具高效性和验证能力，既能高效规划，又能保证对复杂连续动态环境的适应性和可行性，是解决机器人复杂规划问题的有效途径。

Abstract: Intelligent agents must reason over both continuous dynamics and discrete representations to generate effective plans in complex environments. Previous studies have shown that symbolic abstractions can emerge from neural effect predictors trained with a robot's unsupervised exploration. However, these methods rely on deterministic symbolic domains, lack mechanisms to verify the generated symbolic plans, and operate only at the abstract level, often failing to capture the continuous dynamics of the environment. To overcome these limitations, we propose a bilevel neuro-symbolic framework in which learned probabilistic symbolic rules generate candidate plans rapidly at the high level, and learned continuous effect models verify these plans and perform forward search when necessary at the low level. Our experiments on multi-object manipulation tasks demonstrate that the proposed bilevel method outperforms symbolic-only approaches, reliably identifying failing plans through verification, and achieves planning performance statistically comparable to continuous forward search while resolving most problems via efficient symbolic reasoning.

</details>


### [507] [Diff-Muscle: Efficient Learning for Musculoskeletal Robotic Table Tennis](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.08617)
*Wentao Zhao,Jun Guo,Kangyao Huang,Xin Liu,Huaping Liu*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出了一种新颖的肌肉骨骼机器人控制算法Diff-Muscle，通过高动态乒乓球任务验证，实现了高效、低激活且高精度的运动协调。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 目前肌肉骨骼机器人研究多限于简单任务，较难探索多连杆协调运动的潜力，且学习效率受限于高维动作空间和超冗余结构。

Method: 提出Diff-Muscle算法，利用微分平坦性将策略学习从高维冗余肌肉激活空间转化到低维关节空间；在强化学习框架下，结合基于运动学的肌肉激活控制器（K-MAC）进行高层轨迹规划，形成分层控制结构，并在乒乓球任务中验证。

Result: 实验结果表明Diff-Muscle在成功率和肌肉激活度上显著优于现有方法，还能够让双机器人持续对打，实现复杂、高动态的运动协调。

Conclusion: Diff-Muscle算法提升了肌肉骨骼机器人在高动态、复杂任务中的控制效率及表现，是实现智能体精巧运动的重要进展。

Abstract: Musculoskeletal robots provide superior advantages in flexibility and dexterity, positioning them as a promising frontier towards embodied intelligence. However, current research is largely confined to relative simple tasks, restricting the exploration of their full potential in multi-segment coordination. Furthermore, efficient learning remains a challenge, primarily due to the high-dimensional action space and inherent overactuated structures. To address these challenges, we propose Diff-Muscle, a musculoskeletal robot control algorithm that leverages differential flatness to reformulate policy learning from the redundant muscle-activation space into a significantly lower-dimensional joint space. Furthermore, we utilize the highly dynamic robotic table tennis task to evaluate our algorithm. Specifically, we propose a hierarchical reinforcement learning framework that integrates a Kinematics-based Muscle Actuation Controller (K-MAC) with high-level trajectory planning, enabling a musculoskeletal robot to perform dexterous and precise rallies. Experimental results demonstrate that Diff-Muscle significantly outperforms state-of-the-art baselines in success rates while maintaining minimal muscle activation. Notably, the proposed framework successfully enables the musculoskeletal robots to achieve continuous rallies in a challenging dual-robot setting.

</details>


### [508] [Embedding Classical Balance Control Principles in Reinforcement Learning for Humanoid Recovery](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.08619)
*Nehar Poddar,Stephen McCrory,Luigi Penco,Geoffrey Clark,Hakki Erhan Svil,Robert Griffin*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种结合经典平衡指标（如捕获点、质心状态和动量）作为强化学习中特权批评器输入的新方法，实现了具身机器人在面对跌倒和失衡状态时的自主全周期恢复，显著提升了恢复率和泛化能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前具身机器人易因跌倒或失误导致难以恢复，制约了其实用性。现有强化学习方案未明确建模平衡状态，恢复行为多依赖奖励塑造，无法实现对多样失衡情形的有效泛化。

Method: 在训练过程中，将捕获点、质心状态、动量等平衡指标作为批评器特权输入，奖励围绕这些物理量进行设计；而控制器（actor）本体仅基于本体感知输入，实现零样本硬件迁移。训练中不依赖参考轨迹和脚本化接触，通过统一策略涵盖站立、助力步伐和多接触站起等多种恢复情形。

Result: 在Unitree H1-2机器人和Isaac Lab仿真中实现了93.4%的恢复率，覆盖了多种初始姿势和随机跌倒情形。消融实验表明移除平衡结构会导致学习失败。策略还在MuJoCo仿真和早期实物测试中展现出较强的跨环境泛化能力。

Conclusion: 将可解释的平衡结构嵌入强化学习，大幅减少机器人长期处于失效状态的时间，拓宽了自主恢复的适用范围，为不确定环境中机器人自恢复提供了具有现实意义的策略基础。

Abstract: Humanoid robots remain vulnerable to falls and unrecoverable failure states, limiting their practical utility in unstructured environments. While reinforcement learning has demonstrated stand-up behaviors, existing approaches treat recovery as a pure task-reward problem without an explicit representation of the balance state. We present a unified RL policy that addresses this limitation by embedding classical balance metrics: capture point, center-of-mass state, and centroidal momentum, as privileged critic inputs and shaping rewards directly around these quantities during training, while the actor relies solely on proprioception for zero-shot hardware transfer. Without reference trajectories or scripted contacts, a single policy spans the full recovery spectrum: ankle and hip strategies for small disturbances, corrective stepping under large pushes, and compliant falling with multi-contact stand-up using the hands, elbows, and knees. Trained on the Unitree H1-2 in Isaac Lab, the policy achieves a 93.4% recovery rate across randomized initial poses and unscripted fall configurations. An ablation study shows that removing the balance-informed structure causes stand-up learning to fail entirely, confirming that these metrics provide a meaningful learning signal rather than incidental structure. Sim-to-sim transfer to MuJoCo and preliminary hardware experiments further demonstrate cross-environment generalization. These results show that embedding interpretable balance structure into the learning framework substantially reduces time spent in failure states and broadens the envelope of autonomous recovery.

</details>


### [509] [Exp-Force: Experience-Conditioned Pre-Grasp Force Selection with Vision-Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.08668)
*Siqi Shang,Minchao Huang,Bill Fan,Lillian Chin*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种无需接触建模的新方法Exp-Force，只通过单张RGB图像即可预测合适的抓取初始力。该框架通过检索以往类似抓取经验，并结合视觉-语言模型实现上下文推理，显著提升了抓取力量选择的准确性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 抓取初始力量选择过低需要额外调整，过高又可能损坏物体，尤其对于顺从型夹爪更难以建模并估算出最佳初始力量。因此，提出一种无需复杂建模即可快速准确预测抓取力的方法具有重要意义。

Method: 该方法名称为Exp-Force，核心做法为：1）输入单张目标物体的RGB图像，2）从数据库中检索与当前任务相关的历史抓取案例，3）用这些经验结合视觉-语言模型做上下文推理，直接预测最小可行抓力，无需手工设计启发或精确物理建模。

Result: 在129个物体抓取实验中，方法实现了最佳0.43N MAE，将误差降低72%；在30个未见过的新物体真实世界抓取测试中，合理力选择成功率从63%提升到87%。

Conclusion: Exp-Force利用以往抓取经验及视觉-语言模型实现了高效、泛化性强的初始抓力预测，为真实机器人顺从夹爪安全、可靠抓取带来显著提升。

Abstract: Accurate pre-contact grasp force selection is critical for safe and reliable robotic manipulation. Adaptive controllers regulate force after contact but still require a reasonable initial estimate. Starting a grasp with too little force requires reactive adjustment, while starting a grasp with too high a force risks damaging fragile objects. This trade-off is particularly challenging for compliant grippers, whose contact mechanics are difficult to model analytically. We propose Exp-Force, an experience-conditioned framework that predicts the minimum feasible grasping force from a single RGB image. The method retrieves a small set of relevant prior grasping experiences and conditions a vision-language model on these examples for in-context inference, without analytic contact models or manually designed heuristics. On 129 object instances, ExpForce achieves a best-case MAE of 0.43 N, reducing error by 72% over zero-shot inference. In real-world tests on 30 unseen objects, it improves appropriate force selection rate from 63% to 87%. These results demonstrate that Exp-Force enables reliable and generalizable pre-grasp force selection by leveraging prior interaction experiences. http://expforcesubmission.github.io/Exp-Force-Website/

</details>
